dsl_rule.translation_notes: Mapped n-period maximum/minimum to Donchian Channel (dc_upper/dc_lower) with default 10-period lookback. ATR stop loss calculated as 1 ATR ≈ 1.4% for typical volatility. Entry on intrabar breakout expressed as close crossing above/below channel levels. Position size and specific regime filters (TRENDING, HIGH_VOL) should be applied at portfolio/execution layer.

backtest_rule.reason: Mapped n-period maximum/minimum to Donchian Channel (dc_upper/dc_lower) with default 10-period lookback. ATR stop loss calculated as 1 ATR ≈ 1.4% for typical volatility. Entry on intrabar breakout expressed as close crossing above/below channel levels. Position size and specific regime filters (TRENDING, HIGH_VOL) should be applied at portfolio/execution layer.

source_rule_text: Enter long positions when price exceeds the n-period maximum; enter short positions when price falls below the n-period minimum, using a dynamically redrawn channel that adjusts to recent price range.
